notes.context_precision: Fraction of top-3 reranked chunks whose content words overlap with the question (heuristic RAGAS-style; >= 33% overlap scaled to 1.0). Higher = less noise in retrieved context.
notes.context_recall: Fraction of reference answer key words covered by the retrieved context. Higher = context is sufficient to produce a correct answer.
notes.context_precision_vs_citation_precision: context_precision (0.654) measures chunk relevance to the question; citation_precision (0.291) measures whether the model correctly cites the chunks it uses. The gap shows the model retrieves reasonably relevant chunks but fails to cite them accurately.

notes.faithfulness_higher_than_smart_ai: Interactive faithfulness (0.724) is higher than Smart AI (0.583) because query rewriting focuses follow-up questions, improving retrieval precision and reducing hallucination.
notes.hallucination_lower: Hallucination rate (0.041) is lower than Smart AI (0.069) for the same reason — rewritten queries retrieve more targeted context.
notes.memory_continuity: All 50 evaluated turns had access to prior conversation history via Redis. Score of 1.0 means the history retrieval mechanism functioned in every turn (does not measure rewrite quality).
